---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new detector, report format, or improvement
title: '[Feature] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Summary

A short description of what you'd like added or changed.

## Problem It Solves

What pain point does this address? What are you unable to do today?

## Proposed Solution

Describe the solution you have in mind. Be as specific as you can — e.g. a new detector type, a new config key, a change to the report output.

## Alternatives Considered

Any other approaches you considered and why you prefer your proposed solution.

## Additional Context

Any examples, links, or references that would help evaluate the request.
